response.justification: Despite a strong track record in full-stack and distributed systems, the candidate has virtually no recent C++ experience and lacks demonstrated expertise in core requirements like industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), message brokers, multi-threaded C++ systems, or industrial protocols — making them a poor fit for this specialized C++ automation role.
strengths: Extensive experience in event-driven and distributed systems
Strong background in testing, TDD, and developer tooling
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and mentor others
concerns: No recent C++ work in last 9+ years; last C++ role was in 2015
Lacks exposure to IEC 62443, industrial IoT protocols, or secure SDLC in automation contexts
Current focus is on TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not C++/STL/high-performance systems
